text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I have to win this race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's no Teio, and the distance is perfect for
me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The conditions are just right. It'd be seriously sad
if I lose this one...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, what do you mean? I am relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm just trying to be realistic.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What's the point of coming all the way here if I
don't have anything to show for it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...All right! Time to show what I'm capable of!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer is the only one who knows you here
today.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Don't be nervous, Nature. You got this...)
You got this, Natiiiie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the?!

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Kokura Kinen is our turf, and we want to see you win!

text_block_list.name: People of Kokura
text_block_list.text: That's right! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're all... from the shopping district in Kokura...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-wait, but what about your shops?!

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it! Everyone is here anyway!

text_block_list.name: Lady from Kokura
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You must feel anxious being in an
unfamiliar place, right?

text_block_list.name: Lady from Kokura
text_block_list.text: We're all rooting for you! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... That's ridiculous. You people are too nice.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But this place isn't so unfamiliar anymore—not
with you guys here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Yeah... it's gonna be okay. I can do this.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone is watching me. Just take it one step at
a time!)
